query: Should we use Unity, Godot, or Phaser for our 2D mobile puzzle game with a target of 60fps and a small team of 2?
expected_behavior: Produces a comparison matrix for at least 3 engines against defined criteria (team size, platform target, 2D focus, performance)
Does not pick silently — states a recommendation with a 'Why' for this specific use case
Considers team size (2 people) as a key constraint: avoids recommending engines with steep learning curves
Considers the 60fps target: evaluates which engines meet this on mid-range Android
Recommends writing an ADR to document the decision rationale
